# Finances Overview

## Accounts
- **Checking account**: Sparkasse München
- **Savings account**: ING — emergency fund (~6 months expenses)
- **Investment account**: Trade Republic — ETF savings plan

## Monthly Budget (rough)
- Rent: 1450€
- Utilities: 250€
- Groceries: 600€
- Kids (school, hobbies): 300€
- Car: 350€ (leasing + insurance + fuel)
- Leisure: 400€
- Savings: 500€

## Recurring Payments
- Spotify Family: 14.99€
- Netflix: 12.99€
- Gym (FitnessFirst): 49€
- ADAC: yearly, ~100€
- Liability + household insurance: yearly, ~250€

## Goals
- Emergency fund: ✓ done
- Vacation fund: build up 2000€ by June
- ETF: continue monthly 500€ into MSCI World
- Kids education fund: 100€/month each into separate accounts

## Tax
- Tax advisor: Kanzlei Huber, do taxes in March
- Keep receipts for: home office, work equipment, professional development
